---
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

# The Human Brain {.unnumbered}

This online book accompanies the course. It is organized into units. Each unit begins with a substantial overview chapter, followed by more focused chapters.

This textbook is currently **under construction** and will officially open for the Fall 2026 semester.

[Begin with Unit I →](unit_1/overview-control-system.qmd)

## Contents {.unnumbered}

### Unit I — The Embodied Brain {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit I here. -->

- [The Brain as a Control System](unit_1/overview-control-system.qmd)
- [Why Have a Brain?](unit_1/why-have-a-brain.qmd)
- [Evo-Devo and the Vertebrate Brain Plan](unit_1/evo-devo-vertebrate-brain-plan.qmd)
- [The Embodied Brain](unit_1/embodied-brain.qmd)
- [The Brain as a Connected Map](unit_1/brain-as-connected-map.qmd)

### Unit II — The Hypothalamus and the Regulated Body {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit II here. -->

- [Overview: The Hypothalamus and the Regulated Body](unit_2/overview-hypothalamus.qmd)
- [Thermoregulation](unit_2/thermoregulation.qmd)
- [Fluid Balance and Thirst](unit_2/fluid-balance.qmd)
- [Energy Balance and Hunger](unit_2/energy-balance.qmd)
- [Sleep and Circadian Rhythms](unit_2/sleep-circadian.qmd)
- [Stress and the HPA Axis](unit_2/stress-hpa.qmd)
- [Aggression and Defense](unit_2/aggression-defense.qmd)
- [Reproduction](unit_2/reproduction.qmd)
- [Social and Parenting Behavior](unit_2/social-parenting.qmd)
- [Exploration](unit_2/exploration.qmd)

### Unit III — Signaling {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit III here. -->

- [Overview: Signaling](unit_3/overview_signaling.qmd)
- [The Cells of the Brain](unit_3/cells.qmd)
- [How a Neuron Is Excited](unit_3/excitation.qmd)
- [The Slow Chemistry](unit_3/neuromodulation.qmd)
- [How a Synapse Learns](unit_3/learning.qmd)

### Unit IV — Sensing the World for Action {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit IV here. -->

- [Overview: Sensing the World for Action](unit_4/overview_sensing.qmd)
- [Somatosensation: The Body Senses](unit_4/somatosensation.qmd)
- [Pain: The Sense That Tells You Something Is Wrong](unit_4/pain.qmd)
- [Audition](unit_4/audition.qmd)
- [The Visual System I: Turning Light Into Difference](unit_4/vision01.qmd)
- [The Visual System II: Building a World in the Cortex](unit_4/vision02.qmd)
- [The Visual System III: When Seeing Breaks](unit_4/vision03.qmd)
- [Taste: The Sense That Decides Whether to Swallow](unit_4/taste.qmd)
- [Olfaction: The Sense That Breaks the Plan](unit_4/olfaction.qmd)

### Unit V — Action {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit V here. -->

- [Overview: Movement — The Control System in Action](unit_5/overview_action.qmd)
- [Getting to the Muscle](unit_5/getting-to-the-muscle.qmd)
- [Acting on the Seen World](unit_5/acting-on-the-seen-world.qmd)
- [The Predicting Machine](unit_5/the-predicting-machine.qmd)
- [Choosing What to Do](unit_5/choosing-what-to-do.qmd)
- [What It’s Worth](unit_5/what-its-worth.qmd)

### Unit VI — Goal-Directed Futures {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit VI here. -->

- [Overview: The Organ of Tomorrow](unit_6/overview_frontal.qmd)
- [A Common Currency](unit_6/the-common-currency.qmd)
- [Holding the Line](unit_6/holding-the-line.qmd)
- [Feeling the Future](unit_6/feeling-the-future.qmd)
- [The Futures of Others](unit_6/the-futures-of-others.qmd)
- [Wandering When Full](unit_6/wandering-when-full.qmd)
- [Tomorrow Never Comes](unit_6/tomorrow-never-comes.qmd)

### Unit VII — Predictive Maps {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit VII here. -->

- [Overview: The Predictive Map](unit_7/overview-predictive-map.qmd)
- [The Oldest Map](unit_7/oldest-map.qmd)
- [Drawing the Map](unit_7/drawing-the-map.qmd)
- [Navigating Things That Are Not Places](unit_7/navigation-non-space-domains.qmd)
- [The Diary on the Map](unit_7/the-diary-on-the-map.qmd)

### Unit VIII — The Social Niche {.unnumbered}

<!-- Add any contextual introduction to Unit VIII here. -->

- [Overview: A Murder of Brains](unit_8/overview-murder-of-brains.qmd)
- [Words Between Brains](unit_8/words-between-brains.qmd)
- [The Nearest Agent](unit_8/the-nearest-agent.qmd)

### Appendices {.unnumbered}

- [Genetics Primer](appendices/genetics-appendix.qmd)
- [Methods Primer](appendices/methods-appendix.qmd)
